name: audit log: writer rotates to .jsonl.1 when file exceeds --max-bytes (default 10MB)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/audit-log.sh" --append --file "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" --max-bytes 256 --event test --actor t --data '{}' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/audit-log.sh" --append --file "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" --max-bytes 256 --event test --actor t --data '{"big":"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}' && test -f .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl.1 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
